item.title: Camping Piscina Demonte
item.description:
🏕️ Overview

Official website of Camping Piscina Demonte, built with Hugo and deployed via Netlify.

Easy to navigate, elegant on all devices, and custom-made to convey the experience of a mountain stay.

🌐 Visit the site →

🚀 Technologies

  • Hugo (v0.121.2 extended)
  • Netlify (automatic deploy via Git)
  • GitHub (versioning and collaboration)
  • Custom theme (layouts, shortcodes, partials)
  • Responsive CSS styling

📂 Project Structure

content/it/
├── _index.md
├── chi-siamo.md
├── servizi/
├── galleria/
static/
├── img/
layouts/
├── _default/
├── partials/
netlify.toml

✨ Key Features

  • Dynamic hero section and featured areas
  • Cards for chalet, pitches, pool, igloo, etc.
  • Responsive photo gallery
  • Editable sections (Regulation, Price List)
  • Contact section with map, phone and form

🛠️ Dev & testing

Per testare il sito in locale:

item.title: DP Progetti
item.description:
🧱 Overview

Website created for DP Progetti, a consulting and technical design studio working in civil engineering, systems, and workplace safety.
The layout is clean and the information is well structured, designed to be both professional and user-friendly.

🌐 Visit the site →

🚀 Technologies

  • WordPress (flexible and user-managed CMS)
  • Astra theme with Elementor Pro
  • Custom CSS and responsive layout
  • Advanced contact form integration
  • SEO and performance optimization

📂 Project structure

wp-content/
├── themes/
│   └── astra-child/
├── plugins/
│   └── elementor/
├── uploads/
└── page-templates/
    └── custom-sections.php

✨ Key Features

  • Scrolling homepage with clear sections
  • Dedicated pages for services, projects, and contacts
  • Integrated contact form with map and privacy features
  • Fully self-managed content
  • Professional and technical design on all devices

🛠️ Dev & testing

The site is fully manageable via the WordPress admin dashboard.

item.title: Hotel Management System – Custom Software
item.description:
🏨 Overview

A fully custom hotel management system developed for a hospitality business, designed to digitize and streamline the management of:

  • Rooms
  • Bookings
  • Clients
  • Occupancy status
  • Historical records

The project started from a detailed operational analysis and evolved into a solid, modular and scalable platform.

🚀 Technical Architecture

  • Custom PHP 8 backend
  • Relational MySQL database
  • Foreign key relationships between bookings and clients
  • Intelligent client autocomplete integration
  • Deployment on Ubuntu VPS
  • Containerized environment using Docker
  • Git version control with structured branching and releases
  • Automated daily database backups with 14-day retention

✨ Core Features

  • Room occupancy calendar
  • Complete booking management
  • Dedicated client database with archive system
  • Soft-delete client archiving
  • Optimized interface for daily operational use
  • Authentication-based access control

🔐 Security & Deployment

  • Separate development and production environments
  • Environment-based configuration variables
  • Automated database backup system via cron
  • Versioning with release tagging (v1.0, v1.1, v1.2)
  • Controlled production deployment on VPS infrastructure

📈 Outcome

The system is currently running in production and actively used by the hospitality business.

item.title: Hotel & Restaurant Spada Reale
item.description:
🍷 Overview

Official website of Spada Reale, a charming hotel and restaurant in the heart of Roaschia (Italy).

Built with Hugo, the project is fully customized, multilingual (Italian, English, French), responsive, and optimized for display on shopfront screens (night mode enabled).

It features dedicated sections for rooms, restaurant, local shop, regional products, and contact details — all presented with an elegant layout and streamlined navigation.

item.title: Iuliana David - Mental Coach
item.description:
🧘‍♀️ Description

Personal and professional website for Iuliana David, a mental coach specialized in personal growth and mental well-being.

Built with Hugo, the site is multilingual (Italian and Romanian), mobile-optimized, and designed to convey trust, empathy, and professionalism.

It includes sections for personal introduction, testimonials, contacts, and offered services, with a clean and welcoming style.

🌐 Visit the website →

🚀 Technologies

  • Hugo (ultrafast static site generator)
  • Custom HTML/CSS for a modern and accessible design
  • Netlify for continuous deployment
  • i18n for multilingual management (IT / RO)
  • Layout optimized for focus and readability

📂 Struttura del progetto

content/
├── it/
│   ├── _index.md
│   ├── chi-sono.md
│   ├── contatti.md
├── ro/
│   ├── _index.md
│   ├── despre-mine.md
│   ├── contact.md
layouts/
├── _default/
├── partials/

✨ Key features

  • Simple and intuitive navigation
  • Native multilingual content management via Hugo
  • Sections for bio, mission, and coaching approach
  • Contacts and call-to-actions clearly visible on mobile
  • Design focused on personality and clarity of message

🛠️ Dev & testing

To test locally:

item.title: Agriturismo - La Ciapeleta
item.description:
🏡 Description

Official website of La Ciapéleta Farmhouse, a wonderful agriturismo with panoramic sea views in Ventimiglia (IM), Italy.

Built with Hugo and custom HTML/CSS, the site is lightweight, fast, and user-friendly — perfect even for hillside areas with limited connectivity. Each section was designed to reflect the authentic atmosphere of the property, using warm visuals and clear, welcoming text.

It features pages about rooms, restaurant, contact info, and booking.
The design is minimalist yet cozy, aligned with the visual identity of the farmhouse.

item.title: Palawan Tribe
item.description:
🧭 Description

Official website of Palawan Tribe Dolce Amore, a non-profit association supporting indigenous communities in Palawan, Philippines.

Built with ❤️ by Manuel – Assembler Computer, the site is multilingual (Italian & English), fast, sustainable, and designed to reflect the warmth and harmony of tribal life.

Includes sections on history, vision, photo gallery, and contact – all optimized for mobile and slow connections, with ethical SEO and zero tracking.

item.title: Bed & Breakfast A Me Cà
item.description:
🛏️ Description

Official website of Bed & Breakfast A Me Cà, a charming family-run guesthouse located in Albisola Marina, just a few steps from the sea.

Designed with a mobile-first approach, the website was built using Hugo and custom HTML/CSS, offering a simple yet refined user experience — ideal for all age groups, including less tech-savvy users.

The layout is minimalist yet warm, with a palette inspired by the Ligurian coast.
It includes essential sections: introduction, photo gallery, contacts, and booking options.
Optimized for fast loading even on mobile networks.

item.title: Bed & Breakfast - La Legiun Straniera
item.description:
🛏️ Description

Official website of La Legiun Straniera, a cozy holiday home nestled in the hills of Fontanelle di Boves (CN), Italy.

Built using the Namecheap Page Builder, the project was developed under a minimal budget but with maximum attention to aesthetics and accessibility. The site features a clean layout, multilingual support (IT/EN/FR), and clear sections for guests to explore the location, discover the rooms, and access external booking platforms.

item.title: TB Logistica S.r.l.
item.description:
🚛 Description

Official showcase website of TB Logistica S.r.l., a company operating in the field of transport and logistics across Italy.

The project was built using Hugo as a high-performance static site generator, with the goal of conveying reliability, corporate strength, and clarity of services.
It features a clean, professional, and fully responsive layout, designed for seamless browsing on both desktop and mobile.

The content structure includes company presentation, offered services, contact information, and key operational details—crafted with maximum readability and SEO optimization.

item.title: Assembler Computer – Workshop
item.description:
🛠️ Description

Complete redesign of the official website of Assembler Computer, an IT workshop and technical support center based in Cuneo, Italy.

The project was born from the need to replace an outdated static structure — both visually and technically — and build a modern, solid, and easily maintainable foundation.

The new website was developed using Hugo, with fully custom code, prioritizing:

  • service clarity
  • immediate navigation
  • visual consistency with Assembler Studio
  • high performance
  • simple and efficient management

The structure is essential and focused:
About, Services, Contact.

item.title: Assembler Studio
item.description:
🧠 Description

Assembler Studio is the official portfolio website of Assembler Computer, designed to showcase and enhance the web projects developed over time, with a technical, minimal, and user experience-oriented approach.

It’s not just another showcase site, but a structured project that reflects the Assembler workflow:
clarity, full code control, top performance, and functional design.

Built entirely with Hugo, with no pre-made themes, to ensure maximum creative freedom, a solid base, and full scalability.

item.title: Contact
item.description:
Let's talk

We’re here to help! Fill out the form to request information, technical support or collaborate with us on a custom project.

Fields marked with * are required

📨 Email: info@assemblercomputer.net
📍 Location: via XX Settembre 11 - Cuneo (Italy)
🌐 Website: www.assemblercomputer.net

We’re always ready to hear new ideas and provide practical solutions.

Contact us for:

  • urgent tech issues or questions
  • IT consulting
  • website development
  • custom collaborations or digital projects

We usually reply within a short time!

item.title: Who we are
item.description:
Assembler Studio

Assembler Studio is the creative and digital branch of Assembler Computer, a historic IT workshop based in Cuneo (Italy), founded by Davy.

Davy is the technical backbone of Assembler, known for his ability to diagnose and repair complex electronic and logical faults. He specializes in:

  • 🧠 Advanced motherboard and logic board repairs (desktop, laptop, server)
  • 🔌 Connector, fan, power supply and keyboard replacements
  • 📀 NAND/EEPROM reflashing and data recovery
  • 🔥 Thermal and voltage/time analysis (for debugging)
  • 🧪 Vintage board recapping, microsoldering, SMD replacements
  • ⚙️ RAID recovery for photovoltaic systems (e.g. T&G Group, SEA, TEG)
  • 🛠️ In-house stock of spare parts and repairs for industrial equipment

Behind Assembler Studio is Manuel, an IT consultant with solid experience in tech support, systems, networking and web development. I collaborate professionally with Assembler Computer as a technical partner, providing IT support for individuals, professionals and small businesses.
